items.name: awesome-agentic-ai-zh
items.description: A structured, trilingual (繁中 / 简中 / English) learning roadmap for agentic AI — from LLM basics to multi-agent systems. 8 stages · 145+ curated projects · hands-on exercises. 中文 AI agent 學習地圖。

items.name: MemOS
items.description: Self-evolving memory OS for LLM & AI Agents: ultra-persistent memory, hybrid-retrieval, and cross-task skill reuse, with 35.24% token savings

items.name: notebooklm-py
items.description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

items.name: skills
items.description: Browser automation CLI built for AI agents. Break through anti-bot walls, hand off to humans across platforms when stuck. Parallel multi-task execution, independent multi-session operation, isolated multi-account browsing.

items.name: Hands-On-AI-Engineering
items.description: A curated collection of practical AI projects implementing OCR systems, RAG, AI agents, and other AI use cases.

items.name: mega
items.description: Mega is an open-source implementation of Google Piper — a Git-compatible monorepo engine built for the AI Agent era.

items.name: pydantic-ai
items.description: AI Agent Framework, the Pydantic way

items.name: evolver
items.description: The GEP-powered self-evolving engine for AI agents. Auditable evolution with Genes, Capsules, and Events. | evomap.ai

items.name: dagu
items.description: Lightweight and powerful workflow engine that comes with a Web UI. Define workflows in a declarative YAML format. Self-contained and no DBMS is required. Use any AI agent to manage your workflows.

items.name: studio
items.description: Open-source control plane for your AI agents. Connect tools, hire agents, track every token and dollar
